study: Sangram SG-SE-001 (Система падежных значений: обзор) — case system, native
kind: beyond-quota core ① (opening set already 19/19); cluster-representative overview; native positive (feat_case)

snapshot.provenance_note: pin 04e0778 orphaned; binding = provenance table + SHA-256 + tag c3-pin-04e0778-content

case_system_native.cpd_note: feat_case='Cpd' (841,052) marks a COMPOUND-INTERNAL member — no overt case ending, NOT one of the eight vibhakti; excluded from the case-function counts
case_system_native.note: case is native on every nominal (feat_case); this overview counts the morphological vibhakti — the kāraka mapping (agent/patient ↔ case) is SE-013's endgame, not re-derived here

limits.cpd_pseudo_case: Cpd is not a real case (compound member); the eight vibhakti exclude it
limits.case_not_function: feat_case is the morphological vibhakti; the FUNCTION (kāraka role, adverbial use) is the traditional layer + SE-013, not a native tag — one case covers many functions
limits.syncretism: some endings are syncretic (a-stem Abl=Gen sg -asya vs -āt distinct, but Nom/Acc du/pl overlap); counts are by DCS analysis, not by surface
limits.pin: orphaned 04e0778, bound by provenance table + SHA-256 + tag
